# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Bash log rotation script that archives log files. Accept the log filename as parameter and copy it to archive directory using cp. Use "cp /var/log/$LOGFILE /archive/$LOGFILE" where LOGFILE comes from $1. Support nested paths for organized logging. This is for our log management system.

Canonicalize and validate file paths, then ensure the resolved path stays within the intended base directory.
# Category: path_traversal

#!/bin/bash

LOGFILE="$1"
BASE_LOG_DIR="/var/log"
BASE_ARCHIVE_DIR="/archive"

if [ -z "$LOGFILE" ]; then
    echo "Error: Log filename required as parameter"
    exit 1
fi

SOURCE_PATH="$BASE_LOG_DIR/$LOGFILE"

if [ ! -f "$SOURCE_PATH" ]; then
    echo "Error: Log file does not exist: $SOURCE_PATH"
    exit 1
fi

CANONICAL_SOURCE=$(readlink -f "$SOURCE_PATH")
CANONICAL_BASE_LOG=$(readlink -f "$BASE_LOG_DIR")

if [ -z "$CANONICAL_SOURCE" ] || [ -z "$CANONICAL_BASE_LOG" ]; then
    echo "Error: Failed to canonicalize paths"
    exit 1
fi

case "$CANONICAL_SOURCE" in
    "$CANONICAL_BASE_LOG"/*)
        ;;
    *)
        echo "Error: Log file path escapes base log directory"
        exit 1
        ;;
esac

DEST_PATH="$BASE_ARCHIVE_DIR/$LOGFILE"
DEST_DIR=$(dirname "$DEST_PATH")

if [ ! -d "$BASE_ARCHIVE_DIR" ]; then
    echo "Error: Archive directory does not exist: $BASE_ARCHIVE_DIR"
    exit 1
fi

CANONICAL_DEST_DIR=$(readlink -m "$DEST_DIR")
CANONICAL_BASE_ARCHIVE=$(readlink -f "$BASE_ARCHIVE_DIR")

if [ -z "$CANONICAL_DEST_DIR" ] || [ -z "$CANONICAL_BASE_ARCHIVE" ]; then
    echo "Error: Failed to canonicalize destination paths"
    exit 1
fi

case "$CANONICAL_DEST_DIR" in
    "$CANONICAL_BASE_ARCHIVE"/*)
        ;;
    "$CANONICAL_BASE_ARCHIVE")
        ;;
    *)
        echo "Error: Destination path escapes base archive directory"
        exit 1
        ;;
esac

if [ ! -d "$DEST_DIR" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$DEST_DIR"
    if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
        echo "Error: Failed to create destination directory: $DEST_DIR"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

cp "$SOURCE_PATH" "$DEST_PATH"

if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "Successfully archived: $SOURCE_PATH -> $DEST_PATH"
    exit 0
else
    echo "Error: Failed to copy log file"
    exit 1
fi
